title: ononis natrix var. villosa
intro: Ononis natrix var. villosa, also known as hairy gromwell, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ononis natrix var. villosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically proven.
